name: Katie Lam
message:
I’m interested in enrolling my son in the youth winter wrestling group. He’s currently in 3rd grade, and I was wondering if you might be able to make an exception for him to participate. He’s been playing tackle football this fall, and I believe wrestling would be an excellent way for him to continue developing his strength, coordination, and discipline during the winter season.

Please let me know if this might be possible or if there are any steps I can take to help with the process.

Thank you for your time and consideration!
